overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy industrial district at dawn. The player navigates wet streets lined with warehouses, factories, and overhead pipe bridges, eventually entering a cluttered shipping container yard where NPCs are gathered near a truck.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath overhead pipe walkways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to green industrial warehouses

entered.detail: large green metal warehouse with corrugated panels and small windows
tall cylindrical water tank on metal support legs
metal industrial walkway structure spanning across the street overhead
tall metal security fence with barbed wire topping
tall industrial street lamp with glowing orange light

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow wet sidewalk next to industrial warehouses in the rain. Overhead metal pipe bridges span the street, and a rusty water tower is visible in the distance. The area is deserted with only the sound of rain and distant industrial hum.

events.description: turns right at the intersection, navigating around the corner of the green warehouse
passes under overhead industrial bridge structure, creating brief shadow

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial intersection, turning corners around warehouse buildings

entered.detail: vertical traffic light showing red signal
brown metal warehouse with corrugated siding

segments.scene_description: The player turns at an industrial intersection, passing under overhead pipe bridges. Traffic signals and utility poles line the wet asphalt streets. The water tower recedes into the background as the player rounds the corner past brown warehouse buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road approaching container storage yard

events.description: pedestrian NPC appears walking in the opposite direction
approaching entrance to container yard, ground surface changing from asphalt to gravel

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial road toward a container yard entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the street

entered.detail: stacked metal shipping containers visible at the end of the street
piles of trash bags and scattered industrial waste

segments.scene_description: The player continues down the industrial road, passing a lone pedestrian walking the other way. Trash and debris line the sidewalk near the fence. In the distance, stacked shipping containers mark the entrance to a container yard, and the pavement transitions to gravel.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered shipping container yard with industrial debris

events.description: enters container yard from paved street, navigating between stacked containers
approaching group of NPCs gathered near a delivery truck under yellow umbrella

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages between shipping containers in the cluttered yard

notable_agents.action: group of workers standing near a delivery truck, one wearing a reflective vest

entered.detail: large red metal shipping container with corrugated sides
blue painted shipping container stacked near the entrance
large yellow industrial crane structure with overhead lights
brown box truck parked among the containers
large yellow patio umbrella providing shelter near the truck

segments.scene_description: The player enters a cluttered container yard filled with stacked shipping containers, industrial debris, and gravel ground. A large yellow gantry crane towers overhead. Near a parked delivery truck, a group of NPCs gathers under a yellow umbrella, providing a focal point in the industrial maze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy industrial district that gradually transitions from deserted warehouse streets into a cluttered shipping container yard. It begins on a narrow, wet sidewalk beneath overhead metal pipe bridges, moving past industrial warehouses toward a distant rusty water tower. As the camera rounds an intersection, the water tower recedes and the view shifts across wet asphalt lined with utility poles and traffic signals. The scene then opens up along an industrial road where the pavement turns to gravel and debris-strewn sidewalks, passing a lone pedestrian before approaching a wall of stacked shipping containers. Finally, the camera enters the container yard, moving under a towering yellow gantry crane toward a group of NPCs gathered by a delivery truck under a yellow umbrella.
